color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
1. Conversational Claude
(MCP servers)
━━━━━━━━
📝 Architecture
🔍 Code review
✅ Validation
━━━━━━━━
❌ No DB writes

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2. Claude Code
(Linux user: cclaude)
━━━━━━━━
⚙️ Heavy execution
📂 Sandbox: /home/cclaude
━━━━━━━━
❌ No git push
❌ No prod DB

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
3. Telegram bot Claude
(daemon, separate API key)
━━━━━━━━
📖 13 read-only tools
⚙️ 2 admin tools
🚀 1 trigger tool
━━━━━━━━
❌ No write tools exist

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
4. Pipeline agents Claude
(subprocess per phase)
━━━━━━━━
🧠 Classify / Estimate /
Value / Validate
━━━━━━━━
❌ Outputs JSON only

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
12-state pipeline
━━━━━━━━
init → loaded → analyzed →
characterized → contextualized →
classified → ke_set → g_set →
estimated → valued → checked →
written
━━━━━━━━
⛔ AssertionError if state mismatch

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
🛡️ Python validator
━━━━━━━━
assert field ∈ allowed
assert len(justif) ≥ 30
assert no forbidden pair
━━━━━━━━
Only writes to DB if all pass
